title: COMMAND INFO
description: Returns information about one, multiple or all commands.
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of commands to look up

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands. Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands get returned. If you request details about non-existing commands, their return position will be nil. ## Examples COMMAND INFO get set eval COMMAND INFO foo evalsha config bar ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details. **RESP3:** [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details.
intro:
Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands.

Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands
get returned.

If you request details about non-existing commands, their return
position will be nil.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Returns [Array reply]() of details about multiple Redis commands.

Same result format as [`COMMAND`]() except you can specify which commands
get returned.

If you request details about non-existing commands, their return
position will be nil.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
COMMAND INFO get set eval
COMMAND INFO foo evalsha config bar

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility
sections.content:
| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | |

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details.

**RESP3:**

[Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a nested list of command details.
